name: amigoodatvibe
description: 100% local privacy-guaranteed AI collaboration style and prompt skill diagnostic tool in your pocket. Captures Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI conversations in the background and analyzes them safely within your computer's local AI session.

commands.title: AM I GOOD AT VIBE: 🧠 Analyze My AI Coding Vibe
AM I GOOD AT VIBE: 📜 Open Raw Log
AM I GOOD AT VIBE: 🗑 Clear Log
AM I GOOD AT VIBE: 🩺 Run Capture Diagnostics
AM I GOOD AT VIBE: 📥 Import IDE Extension Chat Caches
AM I GOOD AT VIBE: 📚 Analyze From Existing Chat History
AM I GOOD AT VIBE: 🆕 Start Fresh For This Project

chatParticipants.name: amigoodatvibe
chatParticipants.fullName: AM I GOOD AT VIBE Capture
chatParticipants.description: 100% local capture channel — when you mention @amigoodatvibe, your prompt is recorded only on your machine

profiles.title: AM I GOOD AT VIBE Capture

amigoodatvibe.localCliTool.description: Local AI CLI command to use for vibe analysis (e.g. claude, codex, gemini). Runs only on your machine — nothing is sent to external servers.

enumDescriptions: Auto-detect the primary language used in the captured log (default — English or Korean only)
Force the analysis output in English
Force the analysis output in Korean
amigoodatvibe.outputLanguage.description: Language for the roast / nickname / summary output. Only English and Korean are supported. `auto` detects from the log and falls back to English.

amigoodatvibe.autoCapture.description: Whether to enable background auto-capture when VS Code starts.

amigoodatvibe.maskingEnabled.description: Whether to auto-mask sensitive info such as API keys, passwords, and .env values.

amigoodatvibe.cliTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for the analysis CLI execution (milliseconds).

amigoodatvibe.captureCodeChanges.description: Whether to enable file change (diff) history capture.

amigoodatvibe.logRotateBytes.description: Rotation threshold size for raw_history.json (bytes). Default 1MB.
